data.title: DOGE finds support at $0.12 post-holiday, trading down by 4.3%, as crypto market sees low volume.
data.description: The value of Dogecoin has dropped by 4.3% to $0.12 as the cryptocurrency market is back in action post-Christmas. Despite the decrease, Dogecoin is finding stability at important technical thresholds amid limited involvement from institutions in trading.

data.title: Peter Schiff mocks Bitcoin, calling recent rally a failure. Believes trade is over, praises gold and silver.
data.description: Peter Schiff has resumed his criticism of Bitcoin (BTC), declaring that the trade for the digital currency is finished due to its recent underwhelming price movement. In his comments on X, Schiff mocked what he referred to as a disappointing "crypto Christmas." Rather than experiencing the anticipated surge, Bitcoin remained stagnant while the prices of gold and silver increased. According to Schiff, one of the most successful trades in 2025 has been... (Continue reading on the Benzinga website)
THE CAPITAL WILL BE VIA LOW INTEREST LOANS, GUARANTEES - NIKKEI

data.title: Dow falls after record high, Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla stocks favorable. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following its record high closing on Wednesday. Three notable companies - Nvidia, Palantir, and Tesla - are currently considered to be in buy zones. This development comes after a period of notable volatility in the market.

data.title: ADA price stays at $0.35 with JPMorgan's crypto plans boosting sentiment. Key support at $0.35 awaits ADA.
data.description: After JPMorgan's move towards institutional crypto investments indicating wider acceptance, Cardano is currently being traded at $0.35. Technical analysis shows that ADA's price may face a critical support test soon.

data.title: Crypto analyst Benjamin Cowen predicts Bitcoin parallels to 2019 with macro headwinds, muted sentiment, and cycle dynamics, leading into 2026.
data.description: During an interview with Cointelegraph, a crypto analyst highlighted the factors influencing Bitcoin's trajectory up to 2026. These include macroeconomic headwinds, subdued sentiment, and cycle dynamics. This analysis suggests significant trends that may impact the future of Bitcoin over the next five years.

The Agenda: The future of multilateralism This week on CGTN Europe’s The Agenda, Juliet Mann examines the future of multilateralism — as we head into 2026, will the world see more or less global cooperation?

data.title: Global wedding ring market valued at US$56.7 billion in 2024, projected to reach US$80.7 billion by 2030, growing at 6.1% CAGR.
data.description: The latest addition to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings is the "Wedding Rings - Global Strategic Business Report." The global wedding rings market was worth US$56.7 billion in 2024 and is estimated to increase to US$80.7 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.1% from 2024 to 2030. This report offers a detailed examination of market trends, key drivers, and future forecasts to support strategic business decision-making. The growth of the wedding ring market is attributed to a combination of factors.

data.title: XRP nears $1.77 after dropping 1.9% to $1.84, testing lower Bollinger Band, indicating potential downside risk amid holiday trading.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ripple is currently trading close to the $1.77 support level after experiencing a 1.9% decrease to $1.84. Technical analysis indicators indicate the possibility of more downward movement, as the overall cryptocurrency market remains quiet due to the holiday season.

data.title: MemryX reveals MX4 roadmap for AI data centers with 'at-memory' dataflow architecture. Next-gen accelerator promising efficiency.
data.description: Announced by MemryX Inc. from Ann Arbor, Michigan, on December 26, 2025, their strategic plan for the MX4 accelerator has been revealed. This innovative next-generation technology aims to enhance production AI inference acceleration by expanding the company's "at-memory" dataflow architecture from the edge.

JAPAN TO EARMARK $46B TO SUPPORT INVESTMENT IN US - NIKKEI

data.title: BNB nears $831 support amid $23B Bitcoin options expiration, causing crypto volatility.
data.description: The value of Binance Coin has decreased by 1.15% to $831.05 amidst turbulent market conditions stemming from a significant Bitcoin options expiration. BNB is nearing crucial Bollinger Band support levels, indicating potential volatility in the near future.

data.title: USTR to deliver report to Congress on USMCA extension by January, following hearings and trilateral meeting.
data.description: A report from the USTR regarding the potential extension of USMCA for 16 more years is set to be submitted to Congress by the beginning of January. This comes after three days of hearings took place last week, and a meeting occurred on Friday among leaders from the three nations involved.

data.title: GOP support for Trump's trade policies is dwindling due to cost concerns, according to new POLITICO poll.
data.description: Recent polling data from POLITICO reveals that the backing of President Donald Trump's trade and tariff strategies by Republicans is limited due to financial burdens.

data.title: Trump admin and EU at odds over tariff deal as officials meet in Brussels.
data.description: Senior officials from both the Trump administration and the European Union are meeting in Belgium amidst tensions over the summer tariff deal. Both parties accuse each other of deviating from the agreement, which was aimed at resolving trade disputes. The deal, which was agreed upon by both sides, aimed to address tariffs on various goods, particularly affecting industries such as automobile manufacturing. However, disputes have arisen regarding the implementation and enforcement of the agreement. This meeting is crucial as both parties attempt to navigate their differences and ensure that the terms of the deal are upheld, amid concerns of escalating trade tensions.

data.title: ETH price touches $2,920 support, down 1.2% in holiday trading; technical indicators suggest potential consolidation ahead of year-end.
data.description: The current price of Ethereum is approximately $2,920.01, showing a slight decrease of 1.2% during holiday trading. Technical indicators suggest a potential consolidation phase as we approach the end of the year.

data.title: US-China talks on rare earths continue, aiming to finalize export agreement by Thanksgiving, says Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.
data.description: Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent has expressed optimism about the United States and China reaching a final agreement on rare earth exports by Thanksgiving.

data.title: Dems and union groups criticize Trump for pausing port fees on China-linked ships for a year amid trade talks.
data.description: The decision by the Trump administration to temporarily suspend port fees on ships connected to China has come under scrutiny. This pause in fees will last for a year and is being seen as a tactic in the ongoing trade negotiations between the two countries.

data.title: President Trump's emergency tariff regime aimed at China is under scrutiny ahead of a Supreme Court hearing.
data.description: President Donald Trump has justified his emergency tariffs, asserting their necessity following negotiations with China in anticipation of the Supreme Court's review of his extensive measures later this week.
